title.zh: 解释 Transformer 的核心组件。
title.en: Explain the core components of a Transformer.

examPoint.zh: 考察你是否理解 attention、残差连接和前馈网络。

approach.zh: 先讲输入嵌入和位置编码，再讲注意力、残差和 FFN。
approach.en: Cover embeddings and positional encoding first, then attention, residual paths, and the FFN.

answer.zh:
## 中文答案

Transformer 由多头注意力、前馈网络、残差连接和层归一化组成。
answer.en:
## English Answer

A Transformer is built from multi-head attention, feed-forward layers, residual paths, and layer normalization.

pitfall.zh: 只说 self-attention，不提位置编码和训练稳定性。
